channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson described Starmer’s No 10 operation as ‘beleaguered and bereft’ in published files – UK politics live
item.description: Mandelson described Starmer’s No 10 operation as ‘beleaguered and bereft’ in published files – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Watch live: Labour reacts to latest Mandelson files release as secret WhatsApp messages revealed
item.description: Watch live: Labour reacts to latest Mandelson files release as secret WhatsApp messages revealed

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: An example IMV of a politician outsmarting themselves is Wes Streeting releasing his WhatsApps early, causing loads of people to go 'yeah this is a ruse' when would have landed a lot better if today was the first time...
item.description: An example IMV of a politician outsmarting themselves is Wes Streeting releasing his WhatsApps early, causing loads of people to go 'yeah this is a ruse' when would have landed a lot better if today was the first time...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files latest: Starmer’s government must be more ‘Trumpian’, former peer says in newly-released messages
item.description: Mandelson files latest: Starmer’s government must be more ‘Trumpian’, former peer says in newly-released messages

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today's newsletter: some big picture thoughts on the Milburn review and my small picture 'why I do not anticipate I will write about the Mandelson files again' thoughts:
item.description: Today's newsletter: some big picture thoughts on the Milburn review and my small picture 'why I do not anticipate I will write about the Mandelson files again' thoughts:

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Fundraising idea for Labour: the Mandelson files, but with extra commentary from the people in them doing the 'of course, yeah, DEFINITELY would love to meet. I have a slot after the Birnam Wood comes to Dunsinane' em...
item.description: Fundraising idea for Labour: the Mandelson files, but with extra commentary from the people in them doing the 'of course, yeah, DEFINITELY would love to meet. I have a slot after the Birnam Wood comes to Dunsinane' em...

item.title: Reuters: UK releases second batch of files on Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador - Reuters
item.description: UK releases second batch of files on Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador - Reuters

item.title: Bloomberg: UK Publishes New Mandelson Files, Raising Heat on Starmer - Bloomberg
item.description: UK Publishes New Mandelson Files, Raising Heat on Starmer - Bloomberg

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Top Starmer ally insists he is not plotting leadership bid
item.description: Top Starmer ally insists he is not plotting leadership bid

item.title: ConservativeHome: Ed Kennedy: The great irony of Wes Streeting’s NHS legacy
item.description: Ed Kennedy: The great irony of Wes Streeting’s NHS legacy
